name: switchboard
description: Drag and drop to trigger AI agent teams. No prompts, no API keys, one hand free.

commands.title: Switchboard: Copy MCP Config to Clipboard
Switchboard: Export All Completed Plans to Archive

switchboard.controlPlane.onboardingDismi.description: Suppress the one-time Control Plane onboarding offer for the current workspace after it has been dismissed.

switchboard.cli.command.description: CLI command to launch for handoff workflows (e.g. gemini, claude)

switchboard.polling.initialWait.description: Initial wait duration (seconds) before the first check in workflows

switchboard.polling.interval.description: Subsequent polling interval (seconds) for workflow checks

switchboard.accurateCoding.enabled.description: When enabled, coder prompts from sidebar actions include instructions to follow the accuracy.md workflow.

switchboard.leadCoder.inlineChallenge.description: When enabled, Lead Coder execution prompts include an inline challenge step before implementation.

switchboard.reviewer.advancedMode.description: When enabled, reviewer prompts include deep regression analysis instructions (caller tracing, race condition checks, orphaned reference detection). Token-intensive — off by default.

switchboard.pairProgramming.aggressive.description: When enabled, the planner classifies more tasks as Band A (routine), shifting work to the cheaper Coder agent. Only genuinely complex work stays on the Lead.

switchboard.jules.autoSync.description: When enabled, automatically runs git add/commit/push before sending plans to Jules. Defaults to OFF.

switchboard.planner.designDocEnabled.description: When enabled, appends a Design Doc / PRD link to all planner prompts for consistent context delivery.

switchboard.planner.designDocLink.description: URL or path to the Design Doc / PRD to append to planner prompts. Only used when designDocEnabled is true.

switchboard.integrations.preferredProvid.description: Primary project management integration provider. Controls which configuration section is visible in the Setup panel.
enumDescriptions: Show Linear configuration section in the Setup panel
Show ClickUp configuration section in the Setup panel

switchboard.team.strictPrompts.description: Unified team prompt rigor. When enabled, both planner and reviewer prompts use strict mode. Default is light mode.

switchboard.review.strictPrompts.description: Deprecated: use team.strictPrompts instead. Kept for backward compatibility.

switchboard.planner.strictPrompts.description: Deprecated: use team.strictPrompts instead. Kept for backward compatibility.

switchboard.plans.defaultOpenMode.description: Default mode for opening plans from the sidebar.

switchboard.security.strictInboxAuth.description: Require session token authentication for all inbox dispatch messages. Disable only for development.

switchboard.runtime.workspaceMode.description: (Dev only) Allow MCP server to run from mutable workspace copy instead of immutable extension bundle.

switchboard.ollama.intern.enabled.description: Enable the Ollama-backed intern launch target for this workspace.

switchboard.ollama.intern.mode.description: Preferred Ollama runtime for the intern profile in this workspace.

switchboard.ollama.intern.model.description: Saved Ollama model for the intern profile in this workspace.

switchboard.ollama.intern.baseUrl.description: Resolved Ollama API base URL for the saved intern profile.

mcpServers.description: Configuration for Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers

switchboard.research.localFolderPath.description: Path to the local folder containing research files (.md, .txt, .markdown, .rst, .adoc). Used by the Research panel's Cowork/local source.

switchboard.kanban.completedLimit.description: Maximum number of cards shown in the Kanban Completed column (1–500). Higher values may slow rendering.

switchboard.kanban.dbPath.description: Custom file path for the Kanban database (e.g., ~/Google Drive/Switchboard/kanban.db). If empty, uses the default .switchboard/kanban.db in the workspace root. Use this to store the DB in a cloud-synced folder for multi-machine handover.

switchboard.kanban.controlPlaneRoot.description: Explicit Control Plane folder override. Must point to a folder containing .switchboard/kanban.db. Leave empty to use auto-detect.

enumDescriptions: Write targeted rules to .gitignore while keeping shared plans, reviews, sessions, and workflow files tracked (recommended)
Write rules to .git/info/exclude (local only, not committed)
Do not manage ignore rules (manual management required)
switchboard.workspace.ignoreStrategy.description: Strategy for excluding Switchboard files from git tracking.

switchboard.workspace.ignoreRules.description: Stored ignore rules used by the localExclude preset and the editable custom preset. Each entry is appended as a separate line.

switchboard.archive.dbPath.description: Path to DuckDB archive database for historical plan research (e.g., ~/GoogleDrive/SwitchboardArchives/{workspace}.duckdb). Leave empty to disable archiving.

switchboard.archive.autoArchiveCompleted.description: Automatically archive plans when moved to COMPLETED column.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:integration:all: npm run test:regression:plan-sync && npm run test:regression:native-project-api && node src/test/integrations/run-integration-tests.js all
